name: Crab Stuffed Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup mayonnaise OR 1/3 cup sour cream (Light)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the hard-cooked eggs in half lengthwise.
2. Remove the yolks and white yolks from each half.
3. Add flaked crabmeat, celery, and green pepper to the egg yolks.
4. Mix in the dressing mix with mayonnaise or sour cream (Light).
5. Combine everything well.
6. Spoon the mixture into the egg whites.
7. Chill until ready to serve.
